title: Mythic Metals - Create: Crushed Resprites
description: Resprites the Tin, Silver, Platinum and Osmium crushed ores in Create to fit their Mythic Metals palettes
body: Create has pre-existing item registries for platinum, silver, osmium and tin that can be used if a mod implements them, but the mod Mythic Metals uses very different designs for these metals. This texture pack is designed to create parity when playing with both mods installed.
